# KB Visualz

> Orlando portrait photographer serving Central Florida with graduation, prom, family, branding, fashion, studio, couples, engagement, and creative portrait sessions.

KB Visualz is a portrait photography business by Ken Brisenold, based in Orlando, Florida. Ken is a military veteran and UCF graduate who creates polished portrait work focused on presence, confidence, expression, styling, and clean visual storytelling.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://kbvisualz.com/
- Portfolio: https://kbvisualz.com/portfolio/
- Pricing: https://kbvisualz.com/pricing/
- About Ken Brisenold: https://kbvisualz.com/about/

## Services

- Orlando portrait photography
- Central Florida portrait photography
- Graduation portraits
- Prom portraits
- Family portraits
- Personal branding portraits
- Fashion portraits
- Studio portraits
- Couples and engagement portraits
- Creative editorial portraits

## Service Area

KB Visualz serves Orlando and Central Florida, including Winter Park, Kissimmee, Sanford, Lake Mary, Altamonte Springs, and nearby communities.

## Pricing Summary

- Signature Session: $250 for a one-hour portrait session with 15 professional edits.
- Legacy Session: $400 for a two-hour portrait session with 30 professional edits.
- Studio sessions require the client to book the studio separately, then add the selected portrait package price.
- KB Visualz offers photography packages only. Photo and video are not bundled together.

## Booking

Schedule a portrait session through the booking link on https://kbvisualz.com/pricing/.
